birds.config.title: Birds Configuration
birds.config.height_offset.desc: Height above terrain for birds to fly at
birds.config.height_range.desc: Vertical range birds can fly within
birds.config.separation_influence.desc: How strongly birds avoid each other
birds.config.separation_range.desc: Distance at which birds start avoiding each other

birds.config.cohesion_influence.desc: How strongly birds move toward the center of the flock
birds.config.spawn_weight.desc: Spawn weight for birds in valid biomes
birds.config.spawn_min_group.desc: Minimum number of birds per spawn group
birds.config.spawn_max_group.desc: Maximum number of birds per spawn group
